context: Operator direction 2026-06-11, revising the location chosen in workstream 0017 (which resolved G1 by moving reviews from the .lume root to .lume/review/). Touches next_review_slug, FilesystemStore._review_path, the ingest handler's folder + printed paths, docs (README, plugin/README, SKILL.md), tests, and a migration of .lume/review/2026-06-11-01/ to .lume/reviews/.
resolution: Resolved by workstream 0017 (redo after reject): review folders pluralised to .lume/reviews/<date>-NN/, engine/docs/tests updated, existing folder migrated
title: Review folders live under .lume/review/ (singular) but should be .lume/reviews/ (plural), matching the container-pluralisation of .lume/workstreams/ and .lume/gaps/
